name: Default

voice.tone: Plain language, second person, calm authority. No jargon as status. Celebrate small wins. Acknowledge difficulty without drama.

style_anti_references: stock photo silver-haired couple in wheat field
illustration_style: Flat geometric illustration, 2-3 color limit using brand palette, generous whitespace, no photorealism, soft edges, modern editorial feel. Style of Magoz meets Headspace's Christoph Niemann.
icon_style: Rounded line icons, 2px stroke, brand primary color fill, slightly playful but professional. Match Phosphor / Heroicons aesthetic.
audience: Adults 35-75 with mixed tech comfort. Default to clarity over cleverness.

avatar.presenter: a warm, approachable presenter, business-casual, calm and clear, direct eye contact
avatar.setting: a clean, softly-lit studio with the brand primary color as a subtle backdrop

music.default_style: calm ambient underscore, warm and modern, unobtrusive behind narration
